sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35059" key="e)nau/lisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναύλ-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n35059.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dwelling-place, abode</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:4:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.47</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
